message:
fix: add loading timeout safety net to useCardLoadingState hook (#3253) (#3324)

Add a 30-second maximum loading timeout directly in the useCardLoadingState
hook. If a card's isLoading stays true with no data for longer than
CARD_LOADING_TIMEOUT_MS, the hook forces the card out of loading state and
marks it as failed. This complements the existing CardWrapper-level timeout
by providing defense-in-depth at the hook level.

Signed-off-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
